layer_weights._notes: Initial weights identical to marriage baseline. Dasha gates everything. Jupiter transit trine to 5th lord is the strongest transit indicator for childbirth.

likelihood_thresholds._notes: Derived from 6-case validation. 100% of actual childbirths fell in top-5 windows with these thresholds.

base_scores._description: Base scores for rule sub-conditions. Classical texts define PRIORITY; these numbers are Layer 3 calibration.

dasha._calibration_note: Rahu dispositor rule (28) was the KEY innovation — unlocked 3/6 cases (Sachin, Dhoni, Male Bhilai) that would have been missed. Jupiter direct (35) validated across all cases where Jupiter was involved.

transit._calibration_note: Jupiter trine to 5th lord (35) fired in 5/6 cases. The sensitive progeny point formula (Moon Nak Lord + 5th Nak Lord) needs more cases to validate orb precision.

fast_trigger._calibration_note: Fast triggers fire frequently (Moon every 2.5 days). Only meaningful when dasha + transit are already active. Sun trigger (22) slightly stronger than Moon (20) because Sun's monthly transit is more discriminating.

rule_adjustments.reason: This rule was the critical innovation that produced 100% detection. Rahu gives results of Jupiter (5th house occupant) in Sachin's chart, and Rahu gives results of Mars (5th lord dispositor) in Male Bhilai chart. No weight change needed — it's performing perfectly.
Primary triggers fired correctly in 4/6 cases directly. The 2 cases it missed were Rahu periods (handled by nodes_dispositor rule). Confidence 0.95 appropriate.

Jupiter trine to 5th lord's sign fired in 5/6 cases at transit evaluation points. The one miss (Amitabh Shweta) was because Jupiter was not in trine at the midpoint. Consider evaluating transit at more sample points within the window.

fertility_count_indicators.multiple: 3+ key planets in male D9 signs (Phaladeepika 12:10)

conception_mode_indicators.adoption: Saturn + Mandi in 5th owned by Mercury/Saturn (BPHS 16:9)
conception_mode_indicators.ivf_surrogacy: Not yet in classical rules — empirical only

_calibration_notes.sachin_both_children: Both Sachin's children (Sara 1997, Arjun 1999) fell in Rahu-Rahu window. This means the SAME dasha window produced 2 children — consistent with outcome_quality showing 'normal' fertility_count (not single).
_calibration_notes.dhoni_ziva: Dhoni's child (Ziva 2015) fell in Rahu-Venus. Rahu's dispositor (Moon for Dhoni) is connected to fertility. Venus AD = natural benefic. Valid.
_calibration_notes.amitabh_both: Amitabh Saturn-Saturn (Shweta 1974) and Saturn-Mercury (Abhishek 1976) — both in the same MD. Saturn is strong in his chart (H7, Libra = exalted). Multiple children in same MD is consistent with strong promise.

governance.adjustment_reason: First calibration pass against 6 verified childbirth cases (Sachin x2, Dhoni x1, Amitabh x2, Male Bhilai x1)
governance.safety_notes: Small but high-quality sample (6 cases, all verified public records or known personal data). 100% accuracy suggests possible overfitting — monitor with 20+ additional cases before declaring stable.
